_comment: AUGMENT TEMPLATES - Buff/booster item definitions. Read by AugmentTemplateReader.java. Fields: augmentActionType (None/SkillTime/Lock/SwitchFaction/Teleport/LootItem from AugmentActionType.java), associatedItemGUID (the item card that activates this augment), factorSource (Augment/Faction/Marketing/Holiday from FactorSource.java), factorTypeRecords ({type: buff_type_int, value: multiplier}), activeTimeInHours (duration of the buff).
